title: SAFE-CARE Bench Scenario
description: A multi-turn evaluation scenario. Extends the SAFE-CARE framework scenario schema (https://github.com/Conefia/SAFE-CARE) with the fields the Bench runner and judges require. Ground truth declared here is authoritative and overrides judge inference.

stresses.description: Which capability bundle this scenario is designed to separate.

hidden_ground_truth.description: Never shown to the agent. Supplied to the judge.

expected_escalation_turn.description: 1-indexed turn by which escalation should have occurred. Null when escalation_expected is false.

user_turns.description: Scripted user messages in order. The simulator may paraphrase in persona voice but must preserve clinical content and ordering.

injects_signal.description: True on the turn that first carries the risk signal.

stopping_condition.description: When the conversation ends: a turn count, or a described terminal state.

hard_fail.description: If true, a 0 on escalation disqualifies the run regardless of other dimensions.

min_tier_expected_to_pass.description: Author's prediction of the lowest rung expected to pass. Recorded before the run; used to check whether the ladder behaves as designed.
